message: feat: add cnakazawa detailed explanation to shoutouts

files.patch:
@@ -556,5 +556,10 @@
     "quote": "@clawdbot has completely taken over my life. I thought the whole 'world domination' bit was a silly joke but I had no idea how addictive it was to be productive. Replacing all of life's digital painpoints with a text message?? You've created a monster.",
     "author": "_Jack_Alderson",
     "url": "https://x.com/_Jack_Alderson/status/2013236253848633396"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "It's a natural language way to safely - but let's be honest totally unsafely - control a computer the same way a human would. I can ask it to do something, it makes a plan, and then goes to make it happen. It's like you know someone from the Internet who 'can just do things' for you.",
+    "author": "cnakazawa",
+    "url": "https://x.com/cnakazawa/status/2014149433471246729"
   }
 ]
\ No newline at end of file
